content.full_text:
February 27, 1992

State of California  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street, Suite 600  
Sacramento, Ca. 95814  

Attn: Blanca Breeze, Legal Dept.

Dear Ms. Breeze:

This letter is in reference to our previous telephone conversations on the mailing of the River Pines Boosters Club Newsletter. As I stated before, we are a non-profit (local) organization formed in 1964 for the improvement and betterment of the River Pines Community. We are non-political group and have no connection with the River Pines Public Utility District except for the mailings of our newsletter. To that end, we have a contract with them that we will pay 1/2 of the mailing costs, therefore allowing us to reach the majority of the residence and owner-non-resident.

We have read over your regulation 18901 and feel we adhere to the majority of the edicts that would apply to our mailing.

We would appreciate a statement from you allowing us to once more mail our newsletter with the monthly statements sent from the PUD.

We await your response to this request.

Sincerely,

Beverly J. Churchill

cc: River Pines Booster Club
